positive: A stylized, minimalist depiction of an astronaut floating through a nebula made of swirling cosmic dust and vivid gas clouds. The astronaut's silhouette is crisp black against a vibrant gradient background of deep indigo, sapphire blue, and electric turquoise. Glowing constellations and scattered geometric star patterns provide secondary contrast. The overall composition is centrally balanced, designed as a high-contrast, repeatable graphic suitable for apparel. Clean lines, cosmic abstract art style, vector quality, symmetry, octane render, perfect focus.
negative: low resolution, blurry, amateur, messy, artifact, watermark, signature, text, noise, extra limbs, bad anatomy, distorted, grain, logo, trademark
